agentAbility.name: Iron Curtain
agentAbility.description: Deploys a drone swarm that boosts allies' shields and repair rate and grants immunity to status effects.

agentTrait.name: Tinkerer
agentTrait.description: Damaging Gambit Jams the attacker. Closer hits Jam harder.

primaryAttack.name: Single Shot
primaryAttack.description: Requires reload after each shot, most accurate when stationary.

tankAbilities.name: Blast Projectors
tankAbilities.description: Concussion charges beneath the appliqué armor produce a high-pressure blast wave around the vehicle, severely damaging nearby enemies but destroying the vehicle's own armor in the process. The explosion can be charged longer for more damage, but overcharging will cause additional damage to the vehicle and tracks.

tankAbilities.name: Energized Plating
tankAbilities.description: Boost the electric current to internal systems to massively improve armor plating effectiveness and track protection.
